1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
2	"""
3	Tools Package
4	
5	This package contains all the specific tool implementations for the Hermes Agent.
6	Each module provides specialized functionality for different capabilities:
7	
8	- web_tools: Web search, content extraction, and crawling
9	- terminal_tool: Command execution (local/docker/modal/daytona/ssh/singularity backends)
10	- vision_tools: Image analysis and understanding
11	- mixture_of_agents_tool: Multi-model collaborative reasoning
12	- image_generation_tool: Text-to-image generation with upscaling
13	
14	The tools are imported into model_tools.py which provides a unified interface
15	for the AI agent to access all capabilities.
16	"""
17	
18	# Export all tools for easy importing
19	from .web_tools import (
20	    web_search_tool,
21	    web_extract_tool,
22	    web_crawl_tool,
23	    check_firecrawl_api_key
24	)
25	
26	# Primary terminal tool (local/docker/singularity/modal/daytona/ssh)
27	from .terminal_tool import (
28	    terminal_tool,
29	    check_terminal_requirements,
30	    cleanup_vm,
31	    cleanup_all_environments,
32	    get_active_environments_info,
33	    register_task_env_overrides,
34	    clear_task_env_overrides,
35	    TERMINAL_TOOL_DESCRIPTION
36	)
37	
38	from .vision_tools import (
39	    vision_analyze_tool,
40	    check_vision_requirements
41	)
42	
43	from .mixture_of_agents_tool import (
44	    mixture_of_agents_tool,
45	    check_moa_requirements
46	)
47	
48	from .image_generation_tool import (
49	    image_generate_tool,
50	    check_image_generation_requirements
51	)
52	
53	from .skills_tool import (
54	    skills_list,
55	    skill_view,
56	    check_skills_requirements,
57	    SKILLS_TOOL_DESCRIPTION
58	)
59	
60	from .skill_manager_tool import (
61	    skill_manage,
62	    check_skill_manage_requirements,
63	    SKILL_MANAGE_SCHEMA
64	)
65	
66	# Browser automation tools (agent-browser + Browserbase)
67	from .browser_tool import (
68	    browser_navigate,
69	    browser_snapshot,
70	    browser_click,
71	    browser_type,
72	    browser_scroll,
73	    browser_back,
74	    browser_press,
75	    browser_close,
76	    browser_get_images,
77	    browser_vision,
78	    cleanup_browser,
79	    cleanup_all_browsers,
80	    get_active_browser_sessions,
81	    check_browser_requirements,
82	    BROWSER_TOOL_SCHEMAS
83	)
84	
85	# Cronjob management tools (CLI-only, hermes-cli toolset)
86	from .cronjob_tools import (
87	    cronjob,
88	    schedule_cronjob,
89	    list_cronjobs,
90	    remove_cronjob,
91	    check_cronjob_requirements,
92	    get_cronjob_tool_definitions,
93	    CRONJOB_SCHEMA,
94	)
95	
96	# RL Training tools (Tinker-Atropos)
97	from .rl_training_tool import (
98	    rl_list_environments,
99	    rl_select_environment,
100	    rl_get_current_config,
101	    rl_edit_config,
102	    rl_start_training,
103	    rl_check_status,
104	    rl_stop_training,
105	    rl_get_results,
106	    rl_list_runs,
107	    rl_test_inference,
108	    check_rl_api_keys,
109	    get_missing_keys,
110	)
111	
112	# File manipulation tools (read, write, patch, search)
113	from .file_tools import (
114	    read_file_tool,
115	    write_file_tool,
116	    patch_tool,
117	    search_tool,
118	    get_file_tools,
119	    clear_file_ops_cache,
120	)
121	
122	# Text-to-speech tools (Edge TTS / ElevenLabs / OpenAI)
123	from .tts_tool import (
124	    text_to_speech_tool,
125	    check_tts_requirements,
126	)
127	
128	# Planning & task management tool
129	from .todo_tool import (
130	    todo_tool,
131	    check_todo_requirements,
132	    TODO_SCHEMA,
133	    TodoStore,
134	)
135	
136	# Clarifying questions tool (interactive Q&A with the user)
137	from .clarify_tool import (
138	    clarify_tool,
139	    check_clarify_requirements,
140	    CLARIFY_SCHEMA,
141	)
142	
143	# Code execution sandbox (programmatic tool calling)
144	from .code_execution_tool import (
145	    execute_code,
146	    check_sandbox_requirements,
147	    EXECUTE_CODE_SCHEMA,
148	)
149	
150	# Subagent delegation (spawn child agents with isolated context)
151	from .delegate_tool import (
152	    delegate_task,
153	    check_delegate_requirements,
154	    DELEGATE_TASK_SCHEMA,
155	)
156	
157	# File tools have no external requirements - they use the terminal backend
158	def check_file_requirements():
159	    """File tools only require terminal backend to be available."""
160	    from .terminal_tool import check_terminal_requirements
161	    return check_terminal_requirements()
162	
163	__all__ = [
164	    # Web tools
165	    'web_search_tool',
166	    'web_extract_tool',
167	    'web_crawl_tool',
168	    'check_firecrawl_api_key',
169	    # Terminal tools
170	    'terminal_tool',
171	    'check_terminal_requirements',
172	    'cleanup_vm',
173	    'cleanup_all_environments',
174	    'get_active_environments_info',
175	    'register_task_env_overrides',
176	    'clear_task_env_overrides',
177	    'TERMINAL_TOOL_DESCRIPTION',
178	    # Vision tools
179	    'vision_analyze_tool',
180	    'check_vision_requirements',
181	    # MoA tools
182	    'mixture_of_agents_tool',
183	    'check_moa_requirements',
184	    # Image generation tools
185	    'image_generate_tool',
186	    'check_image_generation_requirements',
187	    # Skills tools
188	    'skills_list',
189	    'skill_view',
190	    'check_skills_requirements',
191	    'SKILLS_TOOL_DESCRIPTION',
192	    # Skill management
193	    'skill_manage',
194	    'check_skill_manage_requirements',
195	    'SKILL_MANAGE_SCHEMA',
196	    # Browser automation tools
197	    'browser_navigate',
198	    'browser_snapshot',
199	    'browser_click',
200	    'browser_type',
201	    'browser_scroll',
202	    'browser_back',
203	    'browser_press',
204	    'browser_close',
205	    'browser_get_images',
206	    'browser_vision',
207	    'cleanup_browser',
208	    'cleanup_all_browsers',
209	    'get_active_browser_sessions',
210	    'check_browser_requirements',
211	    'BROWSER_TOOL_SCHEMAS',
212	    # Cronjob management tools (CLI-only)
213	    'cronjob',
214	    'schedule_cronjob',
215	    'list_cronjobs',
216	    'remove_cronjob',
217	    'check_cronjob_requirements',
218	    'get_cronjob_tool_definitions',
219	    'CRONJOB_SCHEMA',
220	    # RL Training tools
221	    'rl_list_environments',
222	    'rl_select_environment',
223	    'rl_get_current_config',
224	    'rl_edit_config',
225	    'rl_start_training',
226	    'rl_check_status',
227	    'rl_stop_training',
228	    'rl_get_results',
229	    'rl_list_runs',
230	    'rl_test_inference',
231	    'check_rl_api_keys',
232	    'get_missing_keys',
233	    # File manipulation tools
234	    'read_file_tool',
235	    'write_file_tool',
236	    'patch_tool',
237	    'search_tool',
238	    'get_file_tools',
239	    'clear_file_ops_cache',
240	    'check_file_requirements',
241	    # Text-to-speech tools
242	    'text_to_speech_tool',
243	    'check_tts_requirements',
244	    # Planning & task management tool
245	    'todo_tool',
246	    'check_todo_requirements',
247	    'TODO_SCHEMA',
248	    'TodoStore',
249	    # Clarifying questions tool
250	    'clarify_tool',
251	    'check_clarify_requirements',
252	    'CLARIFY_SCHEMA',
253	    # Code execution sandbox
254	    'execute_code',
255	    'check_sandbox_requirements',
256	    'EXECUTE_CODE_SCHEMA',
257	    # Subagent delegation
258	    'delegate_task',
259	    'check_delegate_requirements',
260	    'DELEGATE_TASK_SCHEMA',
261	]
262
